bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller
bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.description: Shows how to load a PDF form from a file path and bind it to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller instance for subsequent form‑filling operations.

generate-datatable-and-use-formdataconve.title: Create DataTable and Populate FormDataConverter
generate-datatable-and-use-formdataconve.description: Shows how to build a DataTable using the first row as column headers (simulating an XLSX sheet) and assign it to Aspose.Pdf's FormDataConverter for further operations such as XML conversion.

configure-datacolumn-properties-auto-fil.title: Configure DataColumn Properties and AutoFill PDF Form
configure-datacolumn-properties-auto-fil.description: Demonstrates setting ReadOnly and Unique flags on DataTable columns before importing the table into a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller, and creating a simple PDF template with text fields.

fill-pdf-acroform-using-datatable.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Using DataTable with AutoFiller
fill-pdf-acroform-using-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable whose column names match AcroForm fields, and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill a form field and save the PDF to a new file, keeping the original page layout unchanged.

create-pdf-per-datarow.title: Create PDF with One Page per DataTable Row
create-pdf-per-datarow.description: Generates a PDF where each row of a DataTable is placed on its own page and then verifies that the page count matches the number of rows.

adjust-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.title: Adjust DataTable Columns to Match PDF Form Fields
adjust-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.description: Demonstrates retrieving PDF form field names, renaming DataTable columns to match them (including case‑insensitive matching), and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate the PDF.

fill-pdf-form-using-datatable-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable and AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-using-datatable-autofiller.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form template, defining matching columns in a DataTable, and using the AutoFiller facade to import the data and generate a filled PDF.

fill-pdf-from-multiple-csv-worksheets.title: Fill PDF Template from Multiple CSV Worksheets
fill-pdf-from-multiple-csv-worksheets.description: The example reads each CSV file in a folder, converts it to a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF template, creating a separate PDF for each worksheet.

fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Exception Handling
fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.description: The example shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable into form fields, save the filled document, and handle missing file or processing errors with proper exception handling.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Proper Disposal
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.description: Creates a PDF template with form fields, populates them from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, saves the filled PDF, and disposes the AutoFiller to release unmanaged resources.

batch-fill-pdf-form-data-tables.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Using DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-form-data-tables.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, populating its form fields from multiple DataTable objects, and saving a separate filled PDF for each data set.

fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.description: Shows how to create a PDF form entirely in memory, then populate its fields with data using Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller without writing any intermediate files.

filter-csv-and-fill-pdf-form.title: Filter CSV Data and Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller
filter-csv-and-fill-pdf-form.description: The example loads a CSV file into a DataTable, filters rows based on a condition, and uses Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to populate a PDF form with the filtered data, producing a subset PDF.

split-pdf-custom-names.title: Split PDF into Pages with Custom File Names from DataTable
split-pdf-custom-names.description: Demonstrates splitting a PDF into individual page streams and saving each page using a custom file name taken from a DataTable column.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Against DataTable Columns
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to ensure every required AcroForm field in a PDF has a matching column in a DataTable before importing data with AutoFiller.

generate-pdf-pages-from-datatable-with-a.title: Generate PDF Pages from DataTable with AutoFiller and Log Page Numbers
generate-pdf-pages-from-datatable-with-a.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable, create a separate page for each row, combine them into a single PDF, and log each processed row with its page number.

protect-pdf-with-password.title: Protect PDF with Password Using PdfFileSecurity
protect-pdf-with-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords, allowing printing, using 256‑bit AES via the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity facade.

merge-filled-pdf-forms-from-datatables.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDF Forms from DataTables
merge-filled-pdf-forms-from-datatables.description: Creates a PDF form template, fills it with data from several DataTables using AutoFiller, and concatenates the filled PDFs into a single merged document.

convert-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert PDF to Byte Array In-Memory
convert-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert it to a byte array using a MemoryStream, eliminating any need to write to disk.

async-fill-pdf-from-xlsx.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from XLSX Data
async-fill-pdf-from-xlsx.description: Demonstrates how to read data from an XLSX file asynchronously, bind it to a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, and write the filled PDF to disk with async file I/O.

validate-filled-pdf-fields-against-datat.title: Validate Filled PDF Fields Against DataTable Values
validate-filled-pdf-fields-against-datat.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF form from a DataTable using AutoFiller and verifying each form field value matches the original data in a unit test.

retry-autofiller-import-transient-io.title: Retry AutoFiller Import on Transient I/O Errors
retry-autofiller-import-transient-io.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller and implement a retry loop that handles transient file access exceptions.

pdf-page-table-summary-report.title: Create PDF Page‑to‑Row Identifier Summary Using TableAbsorber
pdf-page-table-summary-report.description: Demonstrates how to extract tables from each PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.TableAbsorber, read the first cell of each row as an identifier, and generate a CSV mapping page numbers to those identifiers.

add-date-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Current Date Header to PDF Pages
add-date-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF template with AutoFiller and then add a header containing the current date to each page using PdfFileStamp.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from CSV Using Mapping Config
fill-pdf-form-from-csv-mapping.description: Shows how to read a CSV (Excel) data file, load a JSON column‑to‑PDF‑field mapping, and dynamically fill an Aspose.Pdf form using that mapping.

stream-large-csv-data-into-pdf-forms.title: Stream Large CSV Data into PDF Forms with AutoFiller
stream-large-csv-data-into-pdf-forms.description: Shows how to read a CSV file in batches, import each batch into Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to fill PDF form fields, and save the merged PDF while keeping memory usage low.

validate-pdf-size-after-filling-form.title: Validate PDF Size After Filling Form with DataTable
validate-pdf-size-after-filling-form.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, fill it with rows from a DataTable using AutoFiller, save the result, and verify that the generated PDF does not exceed a predefined size limit.

fill-pdf-form-from-excel-auto-filler.title: Fill PDF Form from Excel Data using Aspose AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-excel-auto-filler.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, import data from an Excel‑derived DataTable, and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller in a console (or ASP.NET Core) workflow.

cancel-pdf-form-filling-with-timeout.title: Cancel PDF Form Filling with Timeout
cancel-pdf-form-filling-with-timeout.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout by employing a CancellationToken.

convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-dis.title: Convert Large PDF to Excel Using Temporary Disk Buffer
convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-dis.description: Demonstrates extracting a large PDF to an intermediate file in a temporary folder with disk buffering, then converting it to Excel to avoid memory issues.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-datatable.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from DataTable with Numeric Formatting
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-datatable.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, iterating over a DataTable, formatting numeric and date values, and filling matching PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply a semi‑transparent text watermark to every page of a PDF after the form has been filled using Aspose.Pdf.

split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split Filled PDF into Single‑Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to split a filled PDF document into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from CSV Data
fill-pdf-form-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file into a DataTable and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to populate matching PDF form fields and save the filled document.
